mba200tv_def:
CREATE VIEW  [mirae].[MBA200TV]                                                                                             
	         (ACPT_NO,ACPT_SEQ  ,  ITEM_CD  , 	                                         
                TEST_DT ,  BAD_KIND	,   BAD_CD	,                                        
                  PO_NO	,PO_SEQ	,TR_NO		,                                            
                  QC_STS	                                                                      
 ) AS                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                 
SELECT A.ACPT_NO,A.ACPT_SEQ,A.ITEM_CD,        
       A.TEST_DT,A.BAD_KIND,A.BAD_CD,
       B.PO_NO,B.PO_SEQ,TR_NO ,
      CASE  WHEN ISNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MGA100T WHERE TYPE = '2' AND PO_NO = B.PO_NO AND PO_SEQ = B.PO_SEQ),0) <> 0  THEN '입고'  ELSE 
           ( CASE  WHEN SIGNIN_STS =   'ZZ'  THEN '입고' 
                   WHEN SIGNIN_STS <>  'ZZ'  THEN '반출' END)   END   AS QC_STS
 FROM MDA200T A
       INNER JOIN  MDA100T B
       ON A.ACPT_NO = B.ACPT_NO
         AND   A.ACPT_SEQ = B.ACPT_SEQ 
         AND   A.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD 
       LEFT OUTER JOIN  MZA200T C
        ON  C.REMARK  = B.PO_NO
        AND C.PJT_NO  = B.PJT_NO
        AND C.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD
--WHERE A.ACPT_NO = B.ACPT_NO
--  AND    B.ACPT_SEQ = B.ACPT_SEQ
